name: move-cursor-next-display
title: Move Cursor Displays
description: Move the macOS mouse cursor between displays with relative-position and center modes.
author: johnwick

commands.name: move-cursor-next-display
commands.title: Move Cursor to Next Display
commands.description: Move the mouse cursor to the next display.

commands.name: move-cursor-previous-display
commands.title: Move Cursor to Previous Display
commands.description: Move the mouse cursor to the previous display.

commands.name: move-cursor-next-display-center
commands.title: Move Cursor to Next Display Center
commands.description: Move the mouse cursor to the center of the next display.

commands.name: move-cursor-previous-display-center
commands.title: Move Cursor to Previous Display Center
commands.description: Move the mouse cursor to the center of the previous display.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

Use npm run publish to publish this Raycast extension to the Store.

" && exit 1
